Text: Using AI to prep for your interview: suspicious. 👀 Using AI to conduct the interview: innovative. 💁‍♀️ Joveo just launched an AI Interviewer, a tool that conducts automated, structured, on-demand interviews across web, phone, and WhatsApp, and writes scores and hiring recommendations directly into an employer's ATS. The product is a direct response to a documented surge in applicant volume, with Joveo's own data showing up to 9x growth in certain occupations over three years. globenewswire The case for AI-structured interviews is backed by legitimate hiring research: structured formats outperform unstructured ones for predicting job performance. But the overarching double standard in the industry remains: candidates have been discouraged or penalized for using AI, while employers are now deploying AI to run the interview itself, with little public debate about what candidates are entitled to know. The fairness claims deserve scrutiny, because rubric-based scoring can encode bias at scale, and disclosure norms around AI interviewers remain inconsistent and largely unenforced. And let's be real. Employment relationships have always been asymmetric. Candidates are expected to give two weeks' notice; employers can end employment same-day. Candidates are penalized for lying on a resume; job descriptions routinely ask for qualifications that bear no relationship to the actual role. Adding AI to the employer side of the equation does not fix that asymmetry, but it sure does run it faster. More details into today's newsletter! #AI #FutureOfWork #HRTech #TalentAcquisition #Recruiting #AIHiring #PromptedNews #ArtificialIntelligence

Text: We spent years asking how AI would change the way we work. And now, we’re seeing it create new ways for human work to matter. Work related to customer experience, field work, trust-heavy decisions, and anything tied to emotional nuance or physical reality, the human role is not disappearing. We're now seeing more cases where it's becoming more valuable, because the limits of AI are becoming more visible. This week’s issue of Beyond Virtual explores a shift that we can consider a win for us humans. As AI gets smarter, the value of human work is being redefined in real time. What part of work do you think is becoming more human-intensive? #BeyondVirtual #AI #FutureOfWork #BusinessStrategy #Automation

Name: <svg aria-hidden="true" class="_24ae5f3b _3293c70f _7e3c011f" data-supported-dps="16x16" data-token-id="304" fill="currentColor" height="16" id="verified-small" role="img" style="width: 16px; min-width: 16px; height: 16px; min-height: 16px;" viewbox="0 0 16 16" width="16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="m8 15-.86-.29C3.24 13.41 1 10.62 1 7V2.49L8 0l7 2.49V7c0 3.62-2.23 6.41-6.13 7.71zM3 3.9V7c0 3.53 2.6 5.09 4.78 5.82l.23.08.23-.08C10.01 12.23 13 10.71 13 7V3.9L8 2.11zM9.43 5 7.01 8.02l-1.1-1.1L4.5 8.34l2.67 2.67 4.83-6H9.43z"></path></svg>
Text: Will AI replace recruiters? Let’s be honest — it already handles resume screening, sourcing, and scheduling. So the real question is not if… 👉 It’s what happens to recruiters next. These days, many people are saying that AI is increasing job loss and attrition. But the reality is different. 👉 AI is not creating or reducing jobs directly — it is simply making the hiring process faster, smoother, and more efficient. In my latest article, I explore the reality no one talks about: AI is not replacing recruiters — it is changing what great recruiters look like. The future belongs to those who can: ✔ Think strategically ✔ Build real human connections ✔ Use AI as a powerful tool 💬 What do you think? Is AI really impacting hiring numbers, or just transforming the process? I’d love to hear your perspective. Please share your opinion. #HRInsights #FutureOfWork #AIinRecruitment #TalentAcquisition #HiringTrends

Text: We’re hiring **10 AI Interns** for a **6-month internship** that can directly convert into a **full-time role**. Text: 🚀 We’re hiring a Senior Data Scientist at Bkaya. This is not a “just run models and report” kind of role. We’re looking for someone who wants to own problems end-to-end, influence decisions, and build data products that directly impact how thousands of users access financial services in Mexico. If you: 🧠 Think beyond and care about real-world business impact ⚙️ Have strong experience with ML modeling, experimentation, and production environments 🔥 Thrive in fast-paced, high-ownership environments 🤖 Learn new technologies that allow us to improve our stack and communicate learnings with the team. 📊 Ability to integrate new data sources and technologies into existing workflows. 🎯 Solid skills in ML project management requiring coordination with engineering and tech teams. You’ll fit right in. Location: Mexico City 🇲🇽 👉 Apply here: https://lnkd.in/ekxxtHM3 #DataScience #Hiring #Fintech #MachineLearning #Mexico #AI

Text: We're hiring a Data Scientist! I'm excited to share that we're opening a new position on our team. If you're looking for a place where your work actually matters, where models don't sit in notebooks but go straight to production, this might be for you. Here's what makes this role different: We move fast. You'll work on real problems that impact users, and you'll see your solutions live in weeks, not months. Your voice counts. We're a team that values ideas over titles. If you have a better approach, we want to hear it. You'll grow. We're building something meaningful, and we need people who want to learn, contribute, and push the boundaries of what's possible with data. Name: Kaviyarasu R • 3rd+ What’s stopping us from exploring true AGI? 11h •
Text: I am building something that has never been built before. A system that watches Tamil films in real time alongside participants — detects culturally significant moments using multimodal AI — pauses the film — and asks the participant a sharp question in Tamil through a voice-only interface. The data collected is the world's first Tamil behavioural dataset. Not text. Not translations. Authentic Tamil cultural cognition — captured at the moment of reaction, in the participant's own voice, paired with the exact film frame and dialogue that triggered it. We are not scraping the internet. We are building an instrument. --- I am looking for one senior AI engineer to build this with me. What you will build: — Real-time multimodal pipeline: frame capture + dialogue window sent to Claude every 5 seconds during live film playback — LangGraph orchestration: 6 parallel processes running simultaneously during a participant session — Sarvam v3 STT + TTS integration: Tamil voice in, Tamil voice out — AWS S3 data architecture: Gold-standard session records with 5-layer annotation — FastAPI backend + React frontend: kaviclub.org participant experience — Pinecone vector database: film knowledge index queryable by cultural concept and timestamp What you need to have actually built before: — A LangGraph or LangChain multi-agent system in production — A multimodal API call with image + text input (Claude, Gemini, or GPT-4V) — Audio feature extraction (prosodic analysis, STT pipelines) — AWS infrastructure (S3, IAM, deployment) — Something you are genuinely proud of What this is: — A fully documented system across 5 technical specification documents — A 37-day lean build roadmap with sprint-level acceptance criteria — A research-grade dataset that IIT Madras and global AI labs will want access to — The beginning of a flywheel that gets smarter with every participant What this is not: — A vague idea looking for someone to figure it out — A large team with slow decisions — Work that disappears into a drawer --- If you have built multimodal AI systems, care about Indian language AI, and want to work on something scientifically significant — I want to talk to you. DM me or email: contact@kaviclub.org | Call @ 9566138614 Location: Remote. India preferred. --- #AIEngineer #MultimodalAI #IndianLanguageAI #TamilAI #LangGraph #NLP #SpeechProcessing #MachineLearning #AIResearch #BuildingInPublic #Hiring #RemoteWork #StartupHiring #AIStartup #DeepTech #AI4Bharat #SarvamAI #BehavioralAI #DataScience #PythonDeveloper

Text: #Hiring Alert #India Position: Data Scientist Location: Hyderabad, Hybrid (Local candidates preferred) Experience: 7+ Years Notice Period: Immediate to 2 Weeks Preferred Shift: 1:00 PM – 10:00 PM Employment Type: Full-time Please share your updated Resume on ankita@teknobit.com Job Description: We are looking for a highly skilled Data Scientist with strong expertise in SQL, Python, Machine Learning, and Generative AI technologies. The ideal candidate will work closely with business teams to build intelligent data-driven solutions and implement modern AI frameworks including LLMs, RAG architectures, and Agentic AI systems. Key Responsibilities: Develop and deploy Machine Learning and AI models to solve complex business problems. Design and implement Generative AI solutions using LLMs, RAG frameworks, and Agentic AI workflows. Perform advanced data analysis using SQL and Python to extract insights and support decision-making. Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Build and optimize data pipelines, model performance, and scalable AI solutions. Communicate technical concepts and findings clearly to non-technical business teams. Mandatory Skills: Strong expertise in SQL (must-have) for data extraction, transformation, and analysis. Proficiency in Python for data science and ML development. Experience with Machine Learning algorithms and model development. Hands-on experience with Generative AI, LLMs, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) frameworks. Understanding of Agentic AI or AI-driven automation frameworks. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Excellent communication skills with ability to interact directly with business stakeholders. Preferred Skills: Experience in Healthcare or Finance domains. Experience with AI/ML deployment and production environments. Familiarity with data visualization or analytics tools. #Hiring #HiringNow #DataScientist #DataScienceJobs #AIJobs #GenAI #LLM #RAG #AgenticAI #MachineLearning #Python #SQL #ArtificialIntelligence #GenerativeAI #ML #DataAnalytics #AIEngineering #HybridJobs #IndiaHiring #TechJobsIndia #ImmediateJoiners #HealthcareTech #FinTech #DataDriven
